text: Science tells a clearer story about computer vision than social media ever could. Computer vision is how machines interpret images, mimicking human sight. It uses algorithms to analyze pixels, recognizing patterns and objects. From self-driving cars to facial recognition, its applications are vast. Yet, uncertainty remains in understanding context, emotions, and intent. What if machines could see and feel like us? Imagine the possibilities. Curious about the future of computer vision? Follow for more insights!
